name: 24022 Jefferson Church Ph1 Mech Permit Set Rev1 07-08-24. (RCC stamped).pdf
description: Phase One encompasses work required to make the facilities ready for a new congregation. This includes an overhaul of the mechanical systems serving the Educational Building and Gym/Fellowship Hall including both modified and entirely new systems. In addition to accounting for the power needs of new mechanical systems, the electrical scope includes swapping out existing light fixtures with new fixtures in the same location and providing new lighting and outlets to support services hosted in the Fellowship Hall. Plumbing upgrades include the relocation of an existing laundry room and the addition of two small restrooms in an area prior utilized as storage. Phase One also aims to address the roofing scope campus-wide to ensure watertight buildings before future improvements take place. Beyond system and envelope upgrades, interior finishes in these areas of the building will also be upgraded to avoid any future work requirements to the spaces in later phases of construction.

Renovation permit (ref code: 1Y5NNR) was submitted in January but was denied because Jay considers the work to be new construction because the building was moved from one location to another. We are filing for a new construction permit to renovate the building and ensure building code life safety compliance for future use at its current location.

name: 937 Barracks - VCC and RCC Stamped.pdf
description: Remove existing roofing material, Replace interior ridge beam, per attached materials stamped VCC approved 09/17/19. Repair and/or replace underlayment as necessary, Install new natural slate (grey/green), using copper nails, Install new copper drip edge, Install/repair half round copper gutters and flashing Remove existing roof over front gallery and install new standing-seam copper roof. Install/reinstall ceramic or concrete V-style or terra cotta ridge tiles. Replace broken tiles as needed, to match existing. Metal cap-flashing on the parapets or chimneys is not allowed. Paint wooden trim and dormers to match existing, as needed. Note: Trash chutes are required for removal of debris from all roofs All work must conform to standard VCC policies & guidelines Permit does not allow for cap flashing on parapets, chimneys or surrounding walls Torch-applied roofing is not permitted in the Vieux Carré. All repair/replacement work shall match existing in color, size, material, detail, profile and exposure. NOTE: No HVAC platform or rooftop installation approved as part of this permit.
